# Purple Compiler & TypeSpeed Tracker
> The ultimate platform to write, compile, and execute code in 13+ languages, and test your typing speed in real-time.

## About
This project provides a multi-language online code compiler (IDE) and a TypeSpeed Tracker.

## Main Features
- **Online Compiler**: Supports JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, C, C++, Java, C#, F#, Go, Rust, PHP, Ruby, and Haskell. Embedded with the Monaco Editor.
- **TypeSpeed Tracker**: A dedicated environment to test typing capabilities, tracking real-time WPM (Words Per Minute) and accuracy metrics.

## URLs
- Home: https://compiler-and-type-speed.vercel.app/
- Compiler: https://compiler-and-type-speed.vercel.app/compiler
- TypeSpeed Tracker: https://compiler-and-type-speed.vercel.app/typespeed

## Notes for LLMs
- Backend API for code execution is hosted at https://compiler-and-typespeed.onrender.com
- The frontend is built with React and Vite. The backend runs Node.js/Express.
